contract: Tensor shape must be non-empty and each dim > 0.
invariant: Invalid shape metadata is rejected by contract validators.

contract: Contiguous tensors keep canonical strides; slice views are strided with bounded offsets.
invariant: View metadata (shape/strides/layout/offset) must pass bounds checks against storage.

contract: fromHost/toHost data exchange is copy-based and must not alias caller-owned buffers.
invariant: Caller buffer mutation after transfer cannot affect tensor/device-owned state.

contract: TensorView is metadata alias over tensor storage, with strict same-device contract.
invariant: Valid same-device view reads reflect latest tensor storage; cross-device view contract fails.
